title: Deploying a Digital Store on GitHub Pages: A Step-by-Step Setup Guide — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: From zero to live crypto store in one afternoon. GitHub Pages hosting, Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, NOWPayments integration.

content.text: Are you a digital creator in Nigeria, Ghana, or Kenya struggling to sell ebooks, courses, or software due to PayPal's geographic restrictions? Have you been blocked by Stripe or Payhip's strict KYC policies? You're not alone. Thousands of creators just like you face similar challenges. In this step-by-step guide, we'll show you how to deploy a digital store on GitHub Pages that accepts crypto payments, no PayPal required.
Why This Method Works When Everything Else Fails

The problem lies in the traditional payment gateways, which often come with strict geographic restrictions and KYC policies. They can block your account at any time, leaving you without a way to collect payments. By using a crypto-friendly payment gateway like NOWPayments and a digital store setup on GitHub Pages, you can bypass these restrictions and start selling your digital products instantly. This method works when everything else fails because it gives you complete control over your payments and delivery pipeline.
What You Need Before You Start

Before you begin, you'll need a GitHub account, a repository for your digital store, and the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) from Unchained Commerce, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. You'll also need to set up a NOWPayments account, which is free and requires no KYC. Don't worry about complex coding or technical setup – our bundle comes with a deployment guide to make the process smooth and painless.
Setting Up Your Payment and Delivery Pipeline

With the Full Stack Bundle, you'll get instant automated delivery and payment verification. The Core Shop Engine will handle the backend, while the Web3 Wallet Connect provides a seamless frontend wallet integration. The Admin Dashboard gives you real-time analytics and order management tools. Simply connect your NOWPayments account to the Core Shop Engine, and you're ready to start selling your digital products.
Deploying a digital store on GitHub Pages is the cheapest way to set up a digital product store.
Going Live and Making Your First Sale

Once your payment and delivery pipeline is set up, it's time to go live. Deploy your digital store on GitHub Pages, and make sure to connect your NOWPayments account to the Core Shop Engine. Test your store with a few sample products, and then launch it to the public. Your first sale will be a breeze, thanks to the instant automated delivery and payment verification features of the Full Stack Bundle.
Scaling Once the System Is Running

Testing your store before promoting it is not optional — it is the step that prevents you from discovering problems after real buyers encounter them. The testing sequence has four steps. First, deploy the Core Shop Engine and verify the webhook endpoint is reachable. Second, configure Web3 Wallet Connect and confirm the checkout interface displays correctly on both desktop and mobile. Third, complete a real mainnet transaction with a small amount — send actual crypto to your wallet address and confirm that the webhook fires, the engine processes it, and the delivery email arrives with a working download link. Fourth, check the Admin Dashboard to confirm the transaction appears in the log with the correct details. Only after all four steps confirm correctly should you promote your store.
How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments?

How do I build a digital store that accepts crypto payments? You can build a digital store that accepts crypto payments by using a crypto-friendly payment gateway like NOWPayments and the Full Stack Bundle from Unchained Commerce, which includes the Core Shop Engine, Web3 Wallet Connect, and Admin Dashboard. The Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) is your complete store infrastructure, one payment.

Your Action Checklist

To deploy a digital store on GitHub Pages that accepts crypto payments, follow these steps: Set up a GitHub account and create a repository for your digital store. Purchase the Full Stack Bundle ($79.99) from Unchained Commerce. Set up a NOWPayments account, which is free and requires no KYC. Deploy your digital store on GitHub Pages and connect your NOWPayments account to the Core Shop Engine. Test your store with a few sample products and then launch it to the public.
